    publications

    An Empirical Correlation of T$_rm max$-M$_rm WD$ of Dwarf Novae and the Average White Dwarf Mass in Cataclysmic Variables in the Galactic Bulge

    Published in apj, 2018

    Use Google Scholar for full citation

    Recommended citation: Zhuo-li {Yu}, Xiao-jie {Xu}, Xiang-Dong {Li}, Tong \textbf{Bao}, Ying-xi {Li}, Yu-chen {Xing}, Yu-fu {Shen}, "An Empirical Correlation of T$_rm max$-M$_rm WD$ of Dwarf Novae and the Average White Dwarf Mass in Cataclysmic Variables in the Galactic Bulge." apj, 2018.

    Periodic X-ray sources in the Galactic bulge: application of the Gregory-Loredo algorithm

    Published in mnras, 2020

    Use Google Scholar for full citation

    Recommended citation: Tong \textbf{Bao}, Zhiyuan {Li}, "Periodic X-ray sources in the Galactic bulge: application of the Gregory-Loredo algorithm." mnras, 2020.

    Use Google Scholar for full citation

    Recommended citation: Tong \textbf{Bao}, Zhiyuan {Li}, "Searching for quasi-periodic oscillations in active galactic nuclei of the Chandra Deep Field South." mnras, 2022.

    Periodic X-ray sources in the massive globular cluster 47 Tucanae: Evidence for dynamically formed cataclysmic variables

    Published in mnras, 2023

    Use Google Scholar for full citation

    Recommended citation: Tong \textbf{Bao}, Zhiyuan {Li}, Zhongqun {Cheng}, "Periodic X-ray sources in the massive globular cluster 47 Tucanae: Evidence for dynamically formed cataclysmic variables." mnras, 2023.

    The high energy X-ray probe (HEX-P): Resolving the nature of Sgr A* flares, compact object binaries and diffuse X-ray emission in the Galactic center and beyond

    Use Google Scholar for full citation

    Recommended citation: Kaya {Mori}, Gabriele {Ponti}, Matteo {Bachetti}, Arash {Bodaghee}, Jonathan {Grindlay}, Jaesub {Hong}, Roman {Krivonos}, Ekaterina {Kuznetsova}, Shifra {Mandel}, Antonio {Rodriguez}, Giovanni {Stel}, Shuo {Zhang}, Tong \textbf{Bao}, Franz {Bauer}, Maca {Clavel}, Benjamin {Coughenour}, Javier {Garca}, Julian {Gerber}, Brian {Grefenstette}, Amruta {Jaodand}, Bret {Lehmer}, Kristin {Madsen}, Melania {Nynka}, Peter {Predehl}, Ciro {Salcedo}, Daniel {Stern}, John {Tomsick}, "The high energy X-ray probe (HEX-P): Resolving the nature of Sgr A* flares, compact object binaries and diffuse X-ray emission in the Galactic center and beyond." Frontiers in Astronomy and Space Sciences, 2024.
